meta.title: Privacy Policy Placeholder | AI Game Connect
meta.description: A preview privacy policy placeholder explaining form data, external form providers, and pre-launch website behavior for AI Game Connect.

hero.title: Privacy Policy placeholder.
hero.body: This is an honest placeholder for the preview website. A full privacy policy will be published before public launch.

sections.title: Preview privacy notes.
sections.body: This page is not a final legal policy.

blocks.title: Information that may be collected on forms
paragraphs: Registration forms may ask for details such as name, WhatsApp number, city or area, preferred games or sports, availability, skill level, venue details, contact person, working hours, capacity, pricing details, and notes.

blocks.title: No custom backend database in this preview
paragraphs: This static preview website does not include a custom backend database. Form submissions are not stored by this website.

blocks.title: External form tools may be connected later
paragraphs: Registration forms may later connect to external tools such as Google Forms, Tally, or similar services. If external forms are used, submitted data may be handled by the selected form provider.

blocks.title: Full policy before launch
paragraphs: A complete privacy policy will be published before public launch and before any real data collection workflow is activated.

sections.title: Privacy questions.
sections.body: A quick clarification about this placeholder.
